quoteFirst: At 3.35 p.m. the enemy came to the surface 5,000 yards away on the starboard quarter, at
quoteLast: opened fire and continued until 4.13 p.m., when _Penshurst_ herself started firing at 4,500 yards, succeeding in hitting the enemy sixteen times, and undoubtedly seriously damaging him.
